concepts.name: Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A rectangular array of numbers, symbols, or expressions, arranged in rows and columns.

concepts.name: Element
concepts.short_definition: An individual number or symbol within a matrix.

concepts.name: Row
concepts.short_definition: A horizontal line of elements in a matrix.

concepts.name: Column
concepts.short_definition: A vertical line of elements in a matrix.

concepts.name: Dimension
concepts.short_definition: The number of rows and columns in a matrix, expressed as m x n.

concepts.name: Square Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix with an equal number of rows and columns.

concepts.name: Identity Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with ones on the main diagonal and zeros elsewhere.

concepts.name: Zero Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix where all elements are zero.

concepts.name: Scalar
concepts.short_definition: A single number used in scalar multiplication.

concepts.name: Scalar Multiplication
concepts.short_definition: Multiplying each element of a matrix by a scalar.

concepts.name: Matrix Addition
concepts.short_definition: Adding two matrices element by element.

concepts.name: Matrix Subtraction
concepts.short_definition: Subtracting two matrices element by element.

concepts.name: Matrix Multiplication
concepts.short_definition: Multiplying two matrices according to specific rules.

concepts.name: Dot Product
concepts.short_definition: The sum of the products of corresponding elements of two vectors.

concepts.name: Transpose
concepts.short_definition: A matrix obtained by interchanging rows and columns of the original matrix.

concepts.name: Symmetric Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix that is equal to its transpose.

concepts.name: Diagonal Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix where all off-diagonal elements are zero.

concepts.name: Upper Triangular Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix where all elements below the main diagonal are zero.

concepts.name: Lower Triangular Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix where all elements above the main diagonal are zero.

concepts.name: Trace
concepts.short_definition: The sum of the elements on the main diagonal of a square matrix.

concepts.name: Determinant
concepts.short_definition: A scalar value that can be computed from the elements of a square matrix.

concepts.name: Minor
concepts.short_definition: The determinant of a submatrix formed by deleting a row and a column.

concepts.name: Cofactor
concepts.short_definition: A signed minor of a matrix.

concepts.name: Adjoint Matrix
concepts.short_definition: The transpose of the cofactor matrix.

concepts.name: Inverse Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix that, when multiplied by the original matrix, yields the identity matrix.

concepts.name: Singular Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with a determinant of zero, meaning it has no inverse.

concepts.name: Non-singular Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with a non-zero determinant, meaning it has an inverse.

concepts.name: Augmented Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix formed by appending the columns of two given matrices.

concepts.name: Block Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix that is partitioned into smaller matrices called blocks.

concepts.name: Matrix Equation
concepts.short_definition: An equation involving matrices.

concepts.name: Vector
concepts.short_definition: A matrix with only one row or one column.

concepts.name: Vector Space
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors that can be added together and multiplied by scalars.

concepts.name: Linear Combination
concepts.short_definition: A sum of vectors multiplied by scalars.

concepts.name: Span
concepts.short_definition: The set of all possible linear combinations of a set of vectors.

concepts.name: Linear Independence
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors where no vector can be written as a linear combination of the others.

concepts.name: Basis
concepts.short_definition: A set of linearly independent vectors that span a vector space.

concepts.name: Dimension of Vector Space
concepts.short_definition: The number of vectors in a basis for the vector space.

concepts.name: Rank
concepts.short_definition: The dimension of the column space (or row space) of a matrix.

concepts.name: Null Space
concepts.short_definition: The set of all vectors that, when multiplied by a matrix, result in the zero vector.

concepts.name: Column Space
concepts.short_definition: The span of the column vectors of a matrix.

concepts.name: Row Space
concepts.short_definition: The span of the row vectors of a matrix.
